tutor: Zen Headbutt Note: Basculegion’s 2nd Advanced Ability depends on the colour of the Basculin it evolves from. In addition
Basculin now has a White colouration that grants it Rattled as its 2nd Advanced Ability
in addition to the existing Red and Blue options.
Zen Headbutt Note: Basculegion’s 2nd Advanced Ability depends on the colour of the Basculin it evolves from. In addition
Basculin now has a White colouration that grants it Rattled as its 2nd Advanced Ability
in addition to the existing Red and Blue options.
Twister *Origin Forme: Dialga is in its Origin Forme when exposed to an Adamant Crystal as an Extended Action. Exposing it in Origin Forme reverts it to its Altered Forme (found in the Main PokéDex).
Twister *Origin Forme: Palkia is in its Origin Forme when exposed to a Lustrous Globe as an Extended Action. Exposing it in Origin Forme reverts it to its Altered Forme (found in the Main PokéDex).
Zen Headbutt *Therian Forme: The User changes to its Therian Forme if holding a Reveal Glass
and uses its Incarnate Form otherwise.
